name: Potential Website Content Update
notes: This rule triggers when a change or update is made to a web application. This could be a malicious attacker updating the content of a web page causing defacement.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful
when the event matches LOWER("Response Code") = 200 AND LOWER("Method") MATCHES'(put|connect)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Website Content Update on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful
AND when the event matches LOWER("Response Code") = 200 AND LOWER("Method") MATCHES'(put|connect)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Website Content Update
Event description: Detects when a change or update is made to a website causing defacement.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
